text: Head-to-head screening followed by ensembling has produced strong multiclass performance— fo example, an Inception-V3 plus ResNet101 ensemble in a six-class seting (Cha 2019) and DenseNet-BC161/169 cnsermbles across cight discases (Zeng 2021). An advantage of these configurations is high representational capacity and complementary feature exiraction, which supports fine-grained discrimination. A limiation i greater computational cost and model complexity; external validation and inference-time characteristics are not consistently reported in these studics (Cha 2019; Zeng 2021). Ensembling on smaller datasets has also been used o stabilise predictions (dkyol 2022), though this can complicate deployment.
